word: G4954 - σύσσωμος - sýssōmos - soos'-so-mos - Of the same body

sections.paragraph:
- Original: σύσσωμος

- Transliteration: Sussomos

- Phonetic: soos'-so-mos

- Definition:

1. belonging to the same body

2. metaph. to the same church

- Origin: from G4862 and G4983

- TDNT entry: 24:04,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G4862 and G4983; of a joint body that is (figuratively) a fellow member of the Christian community: - of the same body.
